name: Swimming
entries: While you're swimming, each foot of movement costs 1 extra foot (2 extra feet in {@variantrule Difficult Terrain|XPHB|difficult terrain}). You ignore this extra cost if you have a {@variantrule Swim Speed|XPHB} and use it to swim. At the DM's option, moving any distance in rough water might require a successful {@dc 15} Strength ({@skill Athletics|XPHB}) check.
